name: llm-wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge base plugin. Topic-isolated wikis, parallel multi-agent research, thesis-driven investigation, repo assessment, Obsidian dual-linking, retardmax mode, and AGENTS.md for cross-platform support.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-compiled knowledge base. Commands: /wiki (init/status), /wiki:ingest (URLs, files, text, inbox), /wiki:compile (raw to articles), /wiki:query (quick/standard/deep Q&A), /wiki:research (5-10 parallel agents, --new-topic, --min-time), /wiki:thesis (claim → evidence → verdict), /wiki:assess (repo vs wiki vs market), /wiki:search, /wiki:lint (health checks + auto-fix), /wiki:output (summaries, reports, slides + retardmax).
